---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature or enhancement for md2html
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem statement

What problem does this feature solve?  Describe the use case clearly.

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you would like to see.  Include:

- CLI syntax (if adding a new flag or option)
- Expected behaviour
- Example usage

## Alternatives considered

Have you considered any workarounds or alternative approaches?

## Additional context

Links to similar tools, screenshots, or any other relevant information.
